Best game ever

I've spent a lot of time in forklifts IRL so I was excited to try this out. The fundamentals are there, the controls are right, for brief moments I really feel like I'm in a real forklift, but the illusion disappears when I actually try to accomplish anything. Everything needs a ton of tuning, polish, and optimization. The physics are super buggy. The steering wheel is very difficult to use, they need to experiment with that more. But worst is the lift controls. The lift lever is WAY too sensitive, it shoots up and down with the slightest touch and is impossible to use with any finesse(great for launching pallets into orbit though!). The tilt control has the exact opposite problem, tilting is like in super slow motion. The shift side to side is alright. With a good amount of tuning these could easily be fixed. Maybe even make it adjustable so people can set the sensitivity as they like it. Oh and I nearly forgot, the gear selector is super difficult to grab without accidentally grabbing the steering wheel. IRL I can flip between reverse and forward quickly and fluidly, which is really a requirement for a forklift, but in this game it's painful and awkward. 
This game is 70% of the way there, I hope the devs are still working on this game because if they actually put in that last 30% to finish it, it could be really fun. If you're looking for a game to actually play rather than test, this just ain't it at the moment.

Don’t know what all the bad reviews are about. For me it was not glitchy and it was an awesome time. It was fun for a forklift game and had me excited for the full release. To anyone who says it glitches, maybe you need a new headset.
Never been so confused by a tutorial. Also kept falling through floor when moving around. Gave up.
6/5, this game changed my life, unlike other vr games like batman arkham shadow this game is the definition of beauty and the forklift being able to fly is a 10/10 game design, chef kisss, chef kiss.
Game was a bit laggy, had to look through the comments to find how to get into the forklift. There was no reverse so I was stuck and the rest of the game was pretty empty

developer_response.body: It is the Demo version, you only have a tutorial for the forklift where you learn how to get in it. there will be tutorials for the rest of the vehicles in the full version that will be available soon.

reviews.review_description:
this game isn't playabel.  it kept on turning my guy around even when I wasn't pushing my thumb stick button.

it was Turing me around even when I didn't push anything.  and I was playing batman.  and asgard's wrath . no problem.  and with military games I use the highest turn settings without it turning on me over and over.

developer_response.body: It's not our problem, the joystick is the problem. We also have an Oculus Quest 2 with an old joystick and it has this problem. Try recalibrating the joysticks. We may be able to add a joystick sensitivity setting in the game settings in the future.
